---
name: add-ansible-role
description: Add a new role to the local Ansible setup that provisions the machine with dev tools. Use when asked to add an ansible role for a tool, manage a tool's installation with ansible, or automate a CLI tool's install the way the other ansible-managed tools are.
keywords: [ansible, role, provision, install, playbook]
---

# Add an Ansible role

Add a role to the personal provisioning playbook to install and manage a dev tool
the same way the existing ansible-managed tools are handled.
